Build hash maps of local and remote items keyed by ID for O(1) lookups.
An item is 'modified' if its timestamp is greater than lastSync. Check this for both local and remote versions.
When both sides modified the same item, it is a conflict. Use last-write-wins: the item with the higher timestamp is the winner.
Track toUpload (local changes to push) and toDownload (remote changes to pull) separately from the merged result.
